title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Oct 31 2024Colloquium Named in Honor of VCREDITThe NYU Shanghai Education Development Foundation held a ceremony on October 28.CommunityThe New Bund Campus
Oct 31 2024Reception Honors Tenured FacultyOn October 30, the Office of the Provost hosted the first Special Promotion and Tenure Reception.Research
Oct 23 2024NYU Shanghai Hosts a Dialogue with Artist Xu BingThe renowned artist share his unique artistic vision and thoughts on the relationship between art and AI TalksCommunity
Oct 15 2024Exploring Shanghai’s Hidden Gems by Bike NYU Shanghai kicked off its 2024-25 “Chancellor’s Discover China Series” with a cycling tour around Hengsha Island. Community
Sep 26 2024New Exhibition Explores Fermentation as a State of MindThe ICA celebrates its 5th anniversary with a new exhibition featuring the work of Palestinian artist Mirna Bamieh.Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Sep 13 2024Behind the Writing of Zhou Enlai’s First Comprehensive Biography The first comprehensive biography of Zhou in English by Chen Jian.Talks
Sep 13 20242024 Reality Show Puts the Spotlight on StudentsCast members share stories from creating the Reality Show.CommunityStudent
Sep 5 2024Class of 2028 Kicks Off a New AdventureCheck out how first-year students experienced this year’s jam-packed Orientation Week!CommunityStudent
Aug 5 2024NYU Basketball Teams to Play Against Shanghai Jiao Tong University in ShanghaiNYU Violets will visit Shanghai for a doubleheader against Shanghai Jiao Tong University on August 16StudentExternal
Aug 5 2024NYU Shanghai First-Year Doctoral Summer Camp: Setting Off on a New Journey Provide an interdisciplinary platform for these scholars to connect and communicate before heading to NYU.Research
Jun 25 2024ICA Exhibit Time Travels Through Science and Art A new exhibit exploring the relationship between art and science has arrived at New York University Shanghai.Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Jun 13 2024CBER Forum Discusses Climate Change and Business InnovationNearly 200 participants attended the 2024 Annual Forum on Climate Change and Business Innovation.Conference & Symposium
Jun 13 2024NYU Shanghai Launches New Real Estate Institute and Hosts Inaugural ConferenceThe 2024 NYU Annual Conference on Global Real Estate and Capital Markets at NYU Shanghai was hosted.Conference & Symposium
Jun 4 2024Research Journeys: Spring 2024 Undergraduate Research Symposium The Spring 2024 Undergraduate Research Symposium, on May 10th, gave students a chance to share their own research. Research
May 26 2024NYU Shanghai Celebrates 2024 Graduate ConvocationNYU Shanghai celebrates the graduation of 140 PhD and Master’s degree candidates from eight programs.Commencement
